title: Vietnamese Crispy Tofu Stir Fry
description: A quick and flavorful stir fry made with crispy tofu, crunchy vegetables, and a sweet and sour sauce. This dish is a perfect combination of texture and taste.

ingredients.name: Crispy Tofu
ingredients.notes: extra-firm tofu, drained and cut into small cubes

instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the onion and bell pepper and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes, or until they start to soften.
Add the carrot and snow peas and stir-fry for another 2-3 minutes, or until they are tender-crisp.
Add the crispy tofu and stir-fry for 1-2 minutes, or until it is coated with the sauce.
In a small bowl, whisk together the soy sauce, rice vinegar, and honey. Pour the sauce over the tofu and vegetables.
Stir-fry for another minute, or until the sauce has thickened and the ingredients are well coated.
Serve immediately, garnished with sesame seeds and sliced green onions if desired.
